text_block_list.text:
One day, as I pass by the station on<n>my way
home...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I want to buy a ticket, but there<n>are so
many people that I can't get to<n>the ticket
machines.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I don't know what to do...
choice_data_list: Fight your way through the crowd.
Wait for the right moment to slip through.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Fight my way through, huh? Okay.<n>That's
something I'm good at.

Oguri Cap heads to the ticket<n>machine, muscling
her way through<n>the crowd like a snowplow at
the<n>height of winter.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I managed to get a ticket. That<n>was
harder than I thought it'd be.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea making a purchase at a<n>ticket
machine would be such a<n>stressful experience...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, thanks. Your advice was<n>really helpful.
I'm gonna get going<n>now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wait for the right moment, huh? Okay,<n>I'll see
what I can do.

Oguri Cap slowly makes her way<n>through the
crowd and pops out right<n>in front of the ticket
machine.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the advice. I managed to<n>nab myself
a ticket.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it looks like my train's almost<n>here. I'd better
get going now. Bye.

Matching the pace of those around<n>you, then
bursting through at the final<n>moment... That might
make for a good<n>race strategy on slower tracks.
